build_server_unreachable.summary: The remote build-server gate could not be reached or stayed unavailable long enough to block the governed pre-push path.

runner_image_pull_failure.summary: The gate runner images or their registry path could not be pulled even though the surrounding gate contract was otherwise healthy.

controller_dependency_gap.summary: The controller environment was temporarily missing a documented dependency or bootstrap artifact needed to execute the full gate.

emergency_hotfix.summary: A break-glass production fix required a governed push before the normal validation lane could be fully restored.

build_server_disk_full.summary: The build-server gate runner ran out of disk space preventing snapshot upload or container execution.

gate_timeout.summary: The gate validation exceeded the maximum allowed execution time without completing all checks.

schema_migration_in_progress.summary: A structural schema change (new check, renamed lane, catalog format bump) is mid-flight and temporarily breaks the gate contract.

network_partition.summary: Internal network connectivity between controller and build server or registry is disrupted, preventing gate execution.

pre_existing_gate_failures.summary: All gate failures in this run are pre-existing on the target branch and demonstrably unrelated to the commits being pushed; the author has verified no new regressions were introduced.
